name: IntroNoOverlayPolish
notes: The startup surface is video-only for at least 3 seconds. Native play buttons, video controls, progress/timeline UI, and old loading bars/copy are hidden or guarded.
label: No native video overlay and no loading surface
description: Game start displays the intro video without browser play marks or progress bars, holds it for at least 3 seconds, and keeps it until assets are ready.
compatibilityTags: IntroVideoHardVisible intro-hard-visible-v170 IntroVideoMinFit IntroGuardUIPolish corner-sweep-v166 flow-fit-ui-v164 flow-ui-v165
